title: activity — subscribed events
description: Subscribes to core lifecycle events + tenants erasure for cascade cleanup.

listeners.purpose: Hydrate ActivityRegistry with #[LoggableActivity]-decorated model classes at boot. Uses foundation's DiscoversAttributes seam.
Cascade-delete every activity_log row for the tenant. Foundation's FK cascade handles the row delete; this listener writes the audit trail entry (via audit module).
GDPR Art. 17 — replace causer_id + description with anonymised placeholders. Activity rows retained for tenant audit trail continuity.
Dual-write leg #1 of the settings audit contract — writes each changed setting field to activity_log via HasActivityLog on the settings group class.
